title: Builder resume disposition (PRD gauntlet-resume-response, FR-10)
description: Machine-checkable outcome a builder emits at the end of every `gauntlet resume --response` re-evaluation; the deterministic test oracle for the FR-3.0 precedence and FR-5 outcomes, so tests assert on these fields, not on prose. The disposition enum maps 1:1 to the FR-3 categories: proceed_in_place/proceed_with_deviation complete the step (DONE then commit); amendment_required/new_conflict re-park it (parked_reason=upstream_conflict) for a human / the FR-10.4 gate. conflict is required when the disposition re-parks and null/omitted otherwise (enforced by the allOf below). Strict-mode note (mirrors findings.json): a native adapter that requires every property should spell conflict required-but-nullable; the allOf conditional is enforced by the engine's Draft-07 jsonschema validation.

disposition.description: FR-3.0 classification of the latest response. proceed_in_place: conflict resolved through understanding, no artifact change. proceed_with_deviation: a deviation the approved artifacts already permit. amendment_required: the response requests, or proceeds despite, a divergence from approved PRD/plan text — routed back through the artifact's own gate (FR-3(b), no in-place amend). new_conflict: the response is ambiguous or impossible and does not resolve the conflict.

responses_considered.description: The response_id(s) (e.g. implement-resp-1) the builder consumed from human-response.md; the response(s) this disposition is a function of (FR-5/FR-10).

action_summary.description: One-line description of what the builder did or will do.

requested_input.description: What the human must supply or change next. For new_conflict, names what the supplied response did NOT provide (FR-5) — not a verbatim repeat of the prior park.

artifact.description: PRD §X / plan FR-Y, required (non-null) when disposition=amendment_required; may be null for new_conflict.

conflict.description: Required when disposition is amendment_required or new_conflict; null/omitted otherwise (enforced by the allOf conditional below).
